ham.subject: Scheduled Maintenance: AWS VPC Security Group Updates for Project Phoenix
ham.body:
Hi Team,

The AWS Infrastructure team will be applying security group rule updates to the VPC that houses Project Phoenix.

**Scheduled window:** 02:00 AM – 04:00 AM UTC (Monday, 12 March 2026)

During this time, inbound traffic on ports 22 and 80 may be restricted. This is a standard compliance upgrade to meet new internal audit requirements.

If you experience any connectivity issues or have questions, please open a ticket in the IT Service Center: <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
CloudOps Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet is At Risk – Verify Now or Lose Funds!
spam.body:
Dear Valued Investor,

We have detected suspicious activity on the wallet address linked to your account. To protect your assets and avoid an automated seizure, you must confirm your identity within the next 30 minutes.

Click the link below to verify your wallet balance and receive a guaranteed 10% tax refund on the last month’s conversion fee:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent suspension of your crypto holdings and immediate closure of your account.

This is an official notice from the Blockchain Security Authority.

Regards,
Blockchain Security Team
